function.rulebook_notes: Used invoice line-item `item` and `line_eur` values from read records; summed only matching service line entries with issued_on >= 2025-12-01.
function.outcome_justification: The specified service line appears in five read invoices; one is before Dec 2025 and excluded. The four invoices from 2025-12-02 onward have matching `line_eur` values totaling 1200.
